name: Raiyen Zayed Rakin
summary: An aspiring computer science and engineering professional with a passion for technology, problem-solving, and continuous learning, seeking to apply my skills in innovative software development and AI-driven solutions.

experience.title: AIUB FITNESS ZONE
experience.description: A comprehensive fitness management platform tailored for students and faculties of AIUB. The app provides workout plans, health resources and challenges. Designed to promote physical well-being and a healthier lifestyle within the university community.

experience.title: STUDENTDASH2.0
experience.description: A ride-sharing application specifically designed for the student community. It serves users with affordable transportation options, safely share ride with other students all within their community and tracks everything effortlessly.

experience.title: AIUB CGPA CALCULATOR
experience.description: A responsive web-based CGPA calculator for AIUB students. It allows users to input their grades (A+ to F) and corresponding credit counts to calculate their cumulative GPA., slick and mobile-friendly design to ensure usability on all devices.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering
